about.title: Passionate About Building a Safer Digital World

p1.after: who is deeply passionate about cybersecurity and continuously improving my offensive and defensive security skills. My interests include Web Application Security, Active Directory Security, Security Operations, Incident Response, Threat Hunting, Vulnerability Assessment, and Penetration Testing.

p2.highlight: 6-month long-term internship at SOITRON Cyber Security
p2.after: , I gained valuable hands-on experience by working with real-world security events, SIEM technologies, alert validation, incident investigation, and security monitoring within a professional Security Operations Center (SOC).

p3.before: Alongside professional experience, I actively improve my practical skills through Capture The Flag competitions, home laboratory environments, security research, and structured cybersecurity programs including
p3.after: . I strongly believe that continuous learning, curiosity, and hands-on practice are the foundation of becoming a successful cybersecurity professional.

dev.title: Software Development

cyber.title: Cyber Security Journey
cyber.desc: Participated in the Turkey Cyber Homeland (Siber Vatan) Program and completed various cybersecurity training programs while building practical laboratory environments.

soitron.title: SOITRON Cyber Security Internship
soitron.desc: Worked within a professional SOC environment, analyzing security alerts, validating incidents, monitoring SIEM solutions, and collaborating with experienced security analysts.

today.title: Continuous Growth
today.desc: Expanding my expertise through CTF platforms, penetration testing labs, Active Directory environments, malware research, and technical blogging while preparing for advanced cybersecurity certifications.

blogPreview.title: Knowledge Shared Through Research
blogPreview.description: I regularly publish cybersecurity articles, technical research, Active Directory notes, web security techniques, malware analysis, and practical security guides on my personal blog.

post1.title: Active Directory Privilege Escalation: From Enumeration to Domain Admin
post1.description: A practical guide covering Active Directory enumeration, privilege escalation techniques, BloodHound analysis, Kerberos attacks, and domain compromise methodologies.

post2.title: OWASP Top 10 Explained with Practical Examples
post2.description: An in-depth walkthrough of the OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities with real-world examples, exploitation techniques, and effective mitigation strategies.

post3.title: Building a Home Lab for Penetration Testing
post3.description: Learn how to build a personal cybersecurity laboratory using VMware, Kali Linux, Windows Server, Active Directory, vulnerable machines, and CTF platforms.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: Whether you have a cybersecurity opportunity, collaboration idea, or simply want to connect, feel free to reach out.

ctf.description: I continuously improve my offensive and defensive security skills by solving Capture The Flag challenges, vulnerable machines, web security labs, and documenting my solutions through technical write-ups.
